title: The International Arbitration Blog
content:
## The International Arbitration Blog
Expert commentary breaking down the most recent developments on international arbitration topics
This blog contains commentary on recent court and arbitration decisions of relevance to both legal practitioners and businesses involved in the global marketplace. We break down complicated but important issues touching on all aspects of international arbitration. Our posts also offer up-to-date commentary on new legislation regarding arbitration practice in relevant jurisdictions and provide the latest information on new rules or procedures provided or adopted by arbitral bodies, creating a one-stop-shop of resources and expertise.
All form fields are required " * "
